name: Marinated Mushrooms2
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the mushrooms clean of any debris and set aside.
2. Combine all ingredients except the mushrooms in a pot.
3. Cover and bring to a boil over high heat.
4. Add the mushrooms, replace the cover, and lower the heat to medium.
5. Cook until the mushrooms release their juices, about 3 minutes.
6. Pour the contents into a bowl and chill before serving.
